recent_posts.text: Cycles just got a whole lot more powerful. Drag issues across cycles, set team-level goals, and track progress in the new swimlane view. Available now for all plans.
Linear + GitHub Copilot: describe your issue in plain language and let Copilot fill in the details. One less thing to think about.
We're hiring! Staff ML Engineer to work on our AI features. Remote-friendly. Link in bio.

Linear.follower_signal: Growing engagement on AI-related posts vs. core product posts

recent_posts.text: Turn any table into a chart in seconds. Just ask Notion AI. No formulas, no third-party tools, no waiting.
Notion is now HIPAA compliant for Enterprise customers. Your healthcare workflows, now in Notion.
We're opening an office in Tokyo. Notion for everyone, everywhere.

Notion.follower_signal: Enterprise and compliance announcements performing strongly - signaling B2B pivot focus
